overall.description: First-person exploration of a concrete drainage channel in a video game environment (Cyberpunk 2077). The player walks through a sunlit, dusty concrete flood control channel lined with graffiti, garbage piles, and industrial debris, transitioning from beneath an overpass into open areas and approaching a large metal pipe structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete drainage channel beneath highway overpass

events.description: exits the covered area under the overpass into the open channel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the drainage channel, moving from shadow into sunlight beneath the concrete overpass

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass creating partial cover overhead
vertical concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art
mound of blue and black plastic garbage bags piled against the wall
thick cylindrical concrete column supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass in a drainage channel. The camera moves forward from shadow into light, passing colorful graffiti on the left wall and piles of blue garbage bags on the right. The concrete support pillars of the overpass dominate the center view as the player walks steadily through the sheltered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air concrete flood control channel with graffiti walls

events.description: electrical transmission tower becomes visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing down the long straight channel, passing extensive graffiti-covered walls and scattered trash piles

entered.detail: silver metal safety railing running along the top edge of the retaining wall
angled concrete slope rising up from the channel floor on the right side
tall metal lattice power tower visible in the distance against the sky

segments.scene_description: Moving into the open channel, the scene is fully exposed to the hazy afternoon sky. The camera proceeds along the concrete drainage path flanked by graffiti-covered retaining walls on the left and a sloped embankment on the right. Scattered garbage piles line the walls, and a distant electrical transmission tower becomes visible on the horizon as the player continues the steady forward walk.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial drainage area with large pipe and tire pile under bridge

events.description: approaching the large corrugated metal pipe surrounded by discarded tires
passing under the concrete bridge structure with support pillars

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the large industrial pipe with tire pile, navigating under the concrete overpass supports

entered.detail: massive cylindrical metal drainage pipe lying on its side with rusted corrugated surface
cluster of black rubber tires stacked around the base of the large metal pipe
thick vertical concrete pillars supporting the bridge overhead

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a distinctive industrial feature: a large corrugated metal pipe surrounded by discarded tires on the left. The camera moves toward and then under another concrete bridge structure, passing thick support pillars. The graffiti walls recede into the distance as the player navigates through this more cluttered section of the drainage channel, ending beneath the overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a concrete drainage channel that transitions from the shadow of an overpass into an open industrial wasteland before returning to a sheltered structure. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass, moving from deep shadow into bright light past colorful graffiti and piles of blue garbage bags. As the camera emerges into the open channel, the scene expands under a hazy afternoon sky, proceeding along graffiti-covered walls and a sloped embankment toward a distant electrical transmission tower. The path then shifts toward a cluttered industrial area featuring a large corrugated metal pipe and discarded tires before finally passing under another concrete bridge structure.
